title: Realtime voice agents start carrying document context
summary: Sample signal: voice interfaces become useful when they can reason over the user's current working set, not only a live transcript.

title: Workplace agents improve, but harmful actions remain the blocker
summary: Sample signal: task completion is rising, but production adoption depends on permissioning, rollback, audit logs and human review.

title: LLM-as-a-judge variance becomes an evaluation debt
summary: Sample signal: model evaluation pipelines need calibration sets, judge diversity and reproducible scoring before they guide product decisions.

title: Open-weight models become more useful when wrapped in an agent runtime
summary: Sample signal: the edge is no longer just model size. Tooling, memory, permissions, queues and review loops turn cheaper models into usable systems.

title: Enterprise RAG shifts from chat demo to source-governed workflow
summary: Sample Mistral-facing signal: the system matters as much as the model when claims need source traces, ACLs and review status.
